courses.title: Computer Engineering Orientation
courses.description: Introduces the CpE field, career paths, and core expectations. Helps you understand how hardware and software integrate in real systems.

courses.title: Programming Logic And Design — Lab
courses.description: Teaches you step-by-step problem solving using algorithms and pseudocode. Builds your foundation for writing clear and correct programs.

courses.title: Discrete Mathematics
courses.description: Covers logic, sets, relations, functions, and counting methods. Forms your mathematical basis for algorithms and digital systems.

courses.title: Calculus
courses.description: Studies rates of change through derivatives and volume or accumulation through integrals. Helps you model motion, signals, and system behavior.

courses.title: Electrical Circuits For CpE — Lecture & Lab
courses.description: Teaches you to analyze voltage, current, resistance, and power in circuits. You build and measure real circuits in the lab.

courses.title: Electronic Circuits For CpE — Lecture & Lab
courses.description: Introduces diodes, transistors, and amplifiers. You design and test electronic components in the lab.

courses.title: Logic Circuits & Design — Lecture & Lab
courses.description: Covers Boolean algebra and digital logic gates. You design combinational and sequential circuits.

courses.title: Differential Equations
courses.description: Teaches you to solve equations involving rates of change. Essential for modeling circuits and dynamic systems.

courses.title: Object Oriented Programming — Lab
courses.description: Introduces classes, objects, and modular code design. Helps you write reusable and organized programs.

courses.title: Data Structures & Algorithm — Lab
courses.description: Teaches you efficient ways to store and process data. Strengthens your problem solving and program performance.

courses.title: Computer-Aided Drafting — Lab
courses.description: Trains you to use software for creating technical drawings. Develops your precision in engineering visualization.

courses.title: Computer-Aided Drafting & Design — Lab
courses.description: Extends drafting into full design projects. Emphasizes accuracy and engineering standards in your work.

courses.title: Engineering Data Analysis — Lecture & Lab
courses.description: Teaches you to apply statistics to interpret engineering data. You analyze measurements and results using tools.

courses.title: Numerical Methods & Analysis — Lecture & Lab
courses.description: Teaches you computational techniques to solve complex math problems. You implement solutions through programming and simulations.

courses.title: Computer Architecture & Organization — Lecture & Lab
courses.description: Explains how CPUs, memory, and hardware components work together. You explore internal computer operations through lab activities.

courses.title: Operating Systems
courses.description: Teaches you how processes, memory, and files are managed. Explains how software controls hardware resources.

courses.title: Introduction To H.D.L. — Lab
courses.description: Teaches you hardware description languages for digital design. You simulate and model circuits using code.

courses.title: Microprocessor & Microcontroller Systems & Design — Lecture & Lab
courses.description: Focuses on programming and interfacing microcontrollers. You build embedded control systems in the lab.

courses.title: Embedded Systems — Lecture & Lab
courses.description: Guides you in designing systems that combine hardware and software. You create applications involving sensors and real-time control.

courses.title: Fundamentals Of Mixed Signals & Sensors
courses.description: Explains how analog and digital signals interact. Teaches you how sensors are used in real systems.

courses.title: Feedback & Control Systems
courses.description: Teaches you system stability and automatic control. You apply mathematics to regulate system behavior.

courses.title: Data & Digital Communications
courses.description: Covers data transmission, encoding, and networking basics. Helps you understand how devices communicate reliably.

courses.title: Data Signal Processing — Lecture & Lab
courses.description: Teaches you to process and analyze signals using algorithms. You perform filtering and transformations in the lab.

courses.title: Engineering Management
courses.description: Introduces you to project planning and team coordination. Focuses on leadership in engineering work.

courses.title: Engineering Economics
courses.description: Teaches you to apply economic principles to engineering decisions. You evaluate cost, value, and feasibility.

courses.title: Technopreneurship
courses.description: Encourages you to create innovation and technology-based business ideas. Teaches you how to turn projects into products.

courses.title: Basic Occupational Safety & Health
courses.description: Teaches you safe practices in laboratories and workplaces. Promotes hazard awareness and prevention.

courses.title: Methods Of Research (Capstone Design Project 1)
courses.description: Guides you in research planning and proposal writing. Prepares you for your capstone project.

courses.title: CpE Elective 1
courses.description: Lets you study a specialized topic based on your interest. Expands your knowledge in a focused CpE area.

courses.title: Computer Networks & Security — Lecture & Lab
courses.description: Teaches you network structures and protection methods. You configure and secure network systems in the lab.

courses.title: Software Design — Lecture & Lab
courses.description: Focuses on software architecture and development practices. You practice planning, testing, and documentation.

courses.title: Seminars & Field Trips — Drafting
courses.description: Gives you industry exposure through talks and visits. You document and reflect on these experiences.

courses.title: Capstone Design Project 2 — Drafting
courses.description: Continues your project development with detailed designs. Focuses on your technical documentation.

courses.title: Capstone Design Project 3 — Drafting
courses.description: Finalizes and presents your completed project. Demonstrates your integration of CpE knowledge.

courses.title: CpE Laws & Professional Practice
courses.description: Teaches you ethics, laws, and responsibilities of engineers. Prepares you for professional conduct.

courses.title: Emerging Technologies In CpE
courses.description: Exposes you to new trends like AI, IoT, and robotics. Keeps you updated with modern advancements.

courses.title: CpE Elective 2
courses.description: Allows you to explore another specialized CpE topic. Deepens your expertise in an area of interest.

courses.title: CpE Elective 3
courses.description: Further enhances your specialization. Strengthens your career-specific skills.

courses.title: On-The-Job Training 1
courses.description: Gives you hands-on training in a real workplace. You apply your classroom knowledge to practical tasks.

courses.title: On-The-Job Training 2
courses.description: Extends your industry immersion. Develops your professional skills and experience.
